items.description: Woody and the gang go on a road trip with Bonnie's new toy Forky.

items.title: Transformers: EarthSpark
items.description: The first Transformers born on Earth join a human family to protect their new home.

items.title: Trash Truck
items.description: A six-year-old boy and his best friend, a giant trash truck, go on adventures.

items.title: Treasure Planet
items.description: A teenage boy embarks on a space voyage to find a legendary treasure.

items.title: Treehouse Detectives
items.description: A bear brother and sister solve nature mysteries from their treehouse.

items.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
items.description: A teenager discovers a magical amulet that chose him to be the first human Trollhunter.

items.title: Trolls
items.description: Happy trolls must rescue their friends from the Bergens.

items.description: Poppy discovers Branch was in a boy band and must reunite them.

items.title: Trolls World Tour
items.description: Poppy discovers other troll tribes each devoted to a different genre of music.

items.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
items.description: The Trolls and Bergens learn to live together.

items.title: Trolls: TrollsTopia
items.description: Poppy invites delegates from other troll tribes to live in TrollsTopia.

items.title: True and the Rainbow Kingdom
items.description: A girl and her cat use wishes to solve problems in a colorful kingdom.

items.title: Tuck Everlasting
items.description: A girl discovers a family who has found the secret to immortality.

items.description: A blue fox explores nature and solves puzzles on a whimsical island.

items.title: Turbo
items.description: A snail with a dream of speed gains super-fast powers after a freak accident.

items.title: Turning Red
items.description: A 13-year-old girl turns into a giant red panda whenever she gets too excited.

items.title: Tuttle Twins
items.description: Twin siblings learn about economics, history, and freedom through adventures.

items.description: An elderly widower ties thousands of balloons to his house and flies to South America with a young scout.

items.title: Vampirina
items.description: A young vampire girl adjusts to life in a new town.

items.description: The biblical story of Jonah told with VeggieTales characters.

items.description: Three vegetable friends are transported back in time to become real pirates.

items.title: VeggieTales
items.description: Animated vegetables teach moral and biblical lessons through stories and songs.

items.title: Victor and Valentino
items.description: Two brothers encounter supernatural adventures in a small town.

items.title: Vivo
items.description: A music-loving monkey travels from Cuba to Miami to deliver a song.

items.title: WALL-E
items.description: A lonely robot on a future Earth falls in love with a visiting probe and follows her into space.

items.title: Waffles + Mochi
items.description: Two friends travel the world learning about food and cooking.

items.title: Wallace & Gromit: The Curse of the Were-Rabbit
items.description: An inventor and his dog must stop a giant rabbit terrorizing their town.

items.title: Wallykazam!
items.description: A troll uses word magic to solve problems.

items.title: We Bare Bears
items.description: Three bear brothers try to fit in with human society.

items.description: Animated anthology exploring alternate storylines in the Marvel universe.

items.title: When Marnie Was There
items.description: A shy girl befriends a mysterious blonde girl living in an abandoned mansion by the marsh.

items.title: Where the Wild Things Are
items.description: A boy sails to an island of wild creatures and becomes their king.

items.title: Whisper of the Heart
items.description: A girl follows her creative dreams after discovering a mysterious antique shop.

items.title: Wild Kratts
items.description: Animated brothers Martin and Chris Kratt explore animal habitats and learn about wildlife.

items.title: Willy Wonka
items.description: The origin story of the world's greatest chocolate maker.

items.title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory
items.description: A poor boy wins a golden ticket to tour the most wonderful chocolate factory in the world.

items.title: Win or Lose
items.description: A Pixar series following a youth softball team in the week before their big game.

items.title: Winnie the Pooh
items.description: Pooh and his friends go on a quest to save Christopher Robin from an imaginary villain.

items.title: Wish
items.description: A young woman uncovers a dark secret about her kingdom and takes on a magical force to save her community.

items.title: Wishenpoof!
items.description: A girl uses her wishing powers to solve everyday problems.

items.description: A girl discovers that the imaginary amusement park she dreamed up is real.
